name: Sequential Filter Heuristic Registry
summary: Family-local interpretation of shared heuristics for recursive state-estimation pipelines.

family_notes: Prediction residuals should not keep strong structure if the current transition and observation path is explaining the data well.
Persistent residual structure is usually a sign that the current transform path needs validation or replacement.
admissibility_notes: Use residual structure as a first-class warning before spending more budget on parameter retuning.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when repeated residual mismatch persists after an otherwise valid update path.
uncertainty_notes: Residual evidence should be interpreted alongside the current uncertainty model.

references.title: Sequential filter heuristic registry
references.note: Local family interpretation of the shared residual heuristic.

family_notes: Measurement-space outputs need to stay aligned with the modeled observation boundary.
Alignment mismatch often indicates the wrong observation mapping or an incompatible stage ordering.
admissibility_notes: Validate observation alignment before assuming the residual problem is only a tuning issue.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when predicted observations and consumed measurements drift into different structural coordinates.
uncertainty_notes: Structural alignment issues can masquerade as poor score metrics.

references.title: Sequential filter heuristic registry
references.note: Local family interpretation of the shared alignment heuristic.

family_notes: Recursive updates should preserve declared dimensionality and covariance assumptions across steps.
If those assumptions drift, reject or validate the candidate before further rollout.
admissibility_notes: Use as a family-local admissibility check when recursive state contracts may have been violated.
escalation_conditions: Escalate when covariance, dimensionality, or update-order assumptions are no longer coherent.
uncertainty_notes: Treat as a hard warning about structural contract risk, not as a family-specific score.

references.title: Sequential filter heuristic registry
references.note: Local family interpretation of the shared admissibility heuristic.

audit.rationale: Demonstrates that recursive state-estimation families can consume the shared heuristic vocabulary without redefining it.
audit.dejargonized_summary: These are the generic warning signs that matter most for recursive prediction-update pipelines and the structural responses they justify.
uncertainty_notes: This registry interprets shared heuristic identifiers locally without changing their canonical meaning.

references.title: Sequential filter heuristic registry
references.note: Initial cross-family rollout for recursive state-estimation pipelines.
